ResearchProjectDef.label: Apex Mechtech
ResearchProjectDef.description: The technology needed for your mechanitor to create and control Apex-tier mechanoids. You can get chips by using a mechanitor to summon a Three Lords threat. They can also be summoned separately.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Mechtech
ResearchProjectDef.description: The technology needed for your mechanitor to create and control Advanced-tier mechanoids. You can get chips by using a mechanitor to summon a Gazer threat.
